credit: All benchmark orchestration, methodology design, and AI model evaluations directed by N30.

methodology.attempt_policy: attempt 1 = strict trust; attempts 2-3 = recovery signal only
methodology.no_overclaim_rule: recoverable and draft lanes are not production-trust lanes unless explicitly classified as strict end-to-end champions

jackrong_reference.framing: Jackrong/Kyle Hessling public qwopus36-eval style uses agentic reasoning, web-design, and canvas/WebGL prompts. This gallery maps that public comparison vocabulary to N30's strict local trust gates; it is not a hardware apples-to-apples claim.

public_reference_metrics_seen.headline: 62.3 tok/s avg, 87.4k generated tokens, 23.4 min runtime (from the public Space copy)

local_mapping.smoke: agentic trust probes and structured reasoning checks
